@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+import { dateUtil } from '@sprucelabs/calendar-utils'
+import { MercuryClient } from '@sprucelabs/mercury-client'
+import { assertOptions } from '@sprucelabs/schema'
+import { SevenShiftsApi } from './SevenShiftsApi'
+import CalendarEventSyncerImpl from './CalendarEventSyncer'
+
+export default class ShiftSyncerImpl implements ShiftSyncer {
+    public static Class?: new (options: ShiftSyncerOptions) => ShiftSyncer
+
+    private client: MercuryClient
+    private api: SevenShiftsApi
+
+    private constructor(options: ShiftSyncerOptions) {
+        const { client, sevenShiftsApi } = options
+        this.client = client
+        this.api = sevenShiftsApi
+    }
+
+    public static Syncer(options: ShiftSyncerOptions) {
+        assertOptions(options, ['sevenShiftsApi', 'client'])
+        return new (this.Class ?? this)(options)
+    }
+
+    public async sync(options: SyncShiftOptions) {
+        const { to, from } = assertOptions(options, ['from', 'to'])
+        const { organizationId, personId, locationId } = to
+        const { sevenShiftCompanyId, sevenShiftLocationId, sevenShiftUserId } =
+            from
+
+        const startMs = dateUtil.addDays(dateUtil.getStartOfDay(Date.now()), -7)
+        const endMs = dateUtil.addDays(dateUtil.getEndOfDay(Date.now()), 7)
+
+        const shifts = await this.api.listShifts(sevenShiftCompanyId, {
+            locationId: sevenShiftLocationId,
+            userId: sevenShiftUserId,
+            start: new Date(startMs).toISOString(),
+            end: new Date(endMs).toISOString(),
+        })
+
+        const calendarEventSyncer = CalendarEventSyncerImpl.Syncer({
+            client: this.client,
+            eventTitle: 'Shift from SevenShifts',
+            eventTypeSlug: 'shift',
+            isBusy: false,
+            target: {
+                organizationId,
+                locationId,
+                personId,
+                calendarSlug: 'shifts',
+            },
+        })
+
+        await calendarEventSyncer.sync(shifts)
+    }
+}
+
+interface ShiftSyncerOptions {
+    sevenShiftsApi: SevenShiftsApi
+    client: MercuryClient
+}
+
+export interface SyncShiftOptions {
+    from: {
+        sevenShiftCompanyId: number
+        sevenShiftLocationId: number
+        sevenShiftUserId: number
+    }
+    to: {
+        organizationId: string
+        locationId: string
+        personId: string
+    }
+}
+
+export interface ShiftSyncer {
+    sync(options: SyncShiftOptions): Promise<void>
+}
diff --git a/src/syncing/SyncOrchestrator.ts b/src/syncing/SyncOrchestrator.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..d812eed
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/syncing/SyncOrchestrator.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,231 @@
+import { SimpleStoreFactory } from '@sprucelabs/data-stores'
+import { MercuryClient } from '@sprucelabs/mercury-client'
+import { assertOptions } from '@sprucelabs/schema'
+import { SevenShiftsApi } from './SevenShiftsApi'
+import SyncableLocationsStore from '../stores/SyncableLocations.store'
+import SyncStatusesStore from '../stores/SyncStatuses.store'
+import LocationSyncerImpl, {
+    LocationSyncer,
+    LocationSyncResult,
+} from './LocationSyncer'
+import ShiftSyncerImpl, { ShiftSyncer } from './ShiftSyncer'
+import TimePunchSyncerImpl, { TimePunchSyncer } from './TimePunchSyncer'
+import UserSyncerImpl, { UserSyncer } from './UserSyncer'
+
+export default class SyncOrchestratorImpl implements SyncOrchestrator {
+    private syncableLocations: SyncableLocationsStore
+    private locationSyncer: LocationSyncer
+    public static Class?: new (
+        options: SyncOrchestratorConstructorOptions
+    ) => SyncOrchestrator
+    private syncUsers: UserSyncer
+    private shiftSyncer: ShiftSyncer
+    private timePunchSyncer: TimePunchSyncer
+    private syncStatuses: SyncStatusesStore
+    private client: MercuryClient
+
+    private constructor(options: SyncOrchestratorConstructorOptions) {
+        const {
+            syncableLocations,
+            locationSyncer,
+            shiftSyncer,
+            syncUsers,
+            syncStatuses,
+            timePunchSyncer,
+            client,
+        } = options
+
+        this.syncableLocations = syncableLocations
+        this.locationSyncer = locationSyncer
+        this.syncUsers = syncUsers
+        this.syncStatuses = syncStatuses
+        this.shiftSyncer = shiftSyncer
+        this.timePunchSyncer = timePunchSyncer
+        this.client = client
+    }
+
+    public static async Orchestrator(options: OrchestratorOptions) {
+        const { stores, sevenShiftsApi, client } = assertOptions(options, [
+            'sevenShiftsApi',
+            'stores',
+            'client',
+        ])
+
+        const syncableLocations = await stores.getStore('syncableLocations')
+        const syncStatuses = await stores.getStore('syncStatuses')
+
+        const locationSyncer = await LocationSyncerImpl.Syncer({
+            client,
+            sevenShiftsApi,
+            stores,
+        })
+
+        const syncUsers = await UserSyncerImpl.Syncer({
+            client,
+            sevenShiftsApi,
+        })
+
+        const shiftSyncer = ShiftSyncerImpl.Syncer({
+            client,
+            sevenShiftsApi,
+        })
+
+        const timePunchSyncer = TimePunchSyncerImpl.Syncer({
+            client,
+            sevenShiftsApi,
+        })
+
+        return new (this.Class ?? this)({
+            syncableLocations,
+            locationSyncer,
+            syncUsers,
+            syncStatuses,
+            shiftSyncer,
+            timePunchSyncer,
+            client,
+        })
+    }
+
+    public async sync(organizationId: string) {
+        assertOptions({ organizationId }, ['organizationId'])
+
+        await this.syncStatuses.upsertOne(
+            {
+                'target.organizationId': organizationId,
+            },
+            {
+                isSyncing: true,
+                target: {
+                    organizationId,
+                },
+            }
+        )
+
+        const syncableLocations = await this.syncableLocations.find({
+            'target.organizationId': organizationId,
+            shouldSync: true,
+        })
+
+        const syncableCompaniesIds = Array.from(
+            new Set(
+                syncableLocations.map((loc) => loc.target.sevenShiftCompanyId)
+            )
+        )
+
+        const promises: Promise<void>[] = []
+        for (const companyId of syncableCompaniesIds) {
+            promises.push(this.syncLocations(companyId, organizationId))
+        }
+
+        await Promise.all(promises)
+
+        await this.client.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+            'seven-shifts.did-finish-sync::v2026_01_06',
+            {
+                target: {
+                    organizationId,
+                },
+            }
+        )
+    }
+
+    private async syncLocations(
+        sevenShiftsCompanyId: number,
+        organizationId: string
+    ) {
+        const locations = await this.locationSyncer.syncLocations({
+            from: {
+                sevenShiftCompanyId: sevenShiftsCompanyId,
+            },
+            to: {
+                organizationId,
+            },
+        })
+
+        const promises: Promise<void>[] = []
+        for (let location of locations) {
+            promises.push(
+                this.syncLocation(
+                    sevenShiftsCompanyId,
+                    location,
+                    organizationId
+                )
+            )
+        }
+
+        await Promise.all(promises)
+    }
+
+    private async syncLocation(
+        sevenShiftsCompanyId: number,
+        location: LocationSyncResult,
+        organizationId: string
+    ) {
+        const results = await this.syncUsers.syncUsers({
+            from: {
+                sevenShiftCompanyId: sevenShiftsCompanyId,
+                sevenShiftLocationId: location.from.sevenShiftsLocationId,
+            },
+            to: {
+                locationId: location.to.locationId,
+                organizationId,
+            },
+        })
+
+        const promises: Promise<void>[] = []
+        for (const result of results) {
+            promises.push(
+                this.shiftSyncer.sync({
+                    from: {
+                        sevenShiftCompanyId: sevenShiftsCompanyId,
+                        sevenShiftLocationId:
+                            location.from.sevenShiftsLocationId,
+                        sevenShiftUserId: result.from.sevenShiftsUserId,
+                    },
+                    to: {
+                        organizationId,
+                        locationId: location.to.locationId,
+                        personId: result.to.personId,
+                    },
+                })
+            )
+
+            promises.push(
+                this.timePunchSyncer.sync({
+                    from: {
+                        sevenShiftCompanyId: sevenShiftsCompanyId,
+                        sevenShiftLocationId:
+                            location.from.sevenShiftsLocationId,
+                        sevenShiftUserId: result.from.sevenShiftsUserId,
+                    },
+                    to: {
+                        organizationId,
+                        locationId: location.to.locationId,
+                        personId: result.to.personId,
+                    },
+                })
+            )
+        }
+
+        await Promise.all(promises)
+    }
+}
+interface OrchestratorOptions {
+    sevenShiftsApi: SevenShiftsApi
+    stores: SimpleStoreFactory
+    client: MercuryClient
+}
+
+export interface SyncOrchestrator {
+    sync(organizationId: string): Promise<void>
+}
+
+interface SyncOrchestratorConstructorOptions {
+    syncableLocations: SyncableLocationsStore
+    locationSyncer: LocationSyncer
+    syncUsers: UserSyncer
+    syncStatuses: SyncStatusesStore
+    shiftSyncer: ShiftSyncer
+    timePunchSyncer: TimePunchSyncer
+    client: MercuryClient
+}
diff --git a/src/syncing/TimePunchSyncer.ts b/src/syncing/TimePunchSyncer.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..3853d49
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/syncing/TimePunchSyncer.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,106 @@
+import { dateUtil } from '@sprucelabs/calendar-utils'
+import { MercuryClient } from '@sprucelabs/mercury-client'
+import { assertOptions } from '@sprucelabs/schema'
+import { SevenShiftsApi } from './SevenShiftsApi'
+import CalendarEventSyncerImpl from './CalendarEventSyncer'
+
+export default class TimePunchSyncerImpl implements TimePunchSyncer {
+    public static Class?: new (
+        options: TimePunchSyncerOptions
+    ) => TimePunchSyncer
+
+    private sevenShiftsApi: SevenShiftsApi
+    private client: MercuryClient
+
+    private constructor(options: TimePunchSyncerOptions) {
+        const { sevenShiftsApi, client } = options
+
+        this.client = client
+        this.sevenShiftsApi = sevenShiftsApi
+    }
+
+    public static Syncer(options: TimePunchSyncerOptions) {
+        assertOptions(options, ['client', 'sevenShiftsApi'])
+        return new (this.Class ?? this)(options)
+    }
+
+    public async sync(options: SyncTimePunchOptions) {
+        const { from, to } = assertOptions(options, ['from', 'to'])
+        const { sevenShiftCompanyId, sevenShiftLocationId, sevenShiftUserId } =
+            from
+        const { organizationId, locationId, personId } = to
+
+        const startMs = dateUtil.addDays(dateUtil.getStartOfDay(Date.now()), -7)
+        const endMs = dateUtil.addDays(dateUtil.getEndOfDay(Date.now()), 7)
+
+        const punches = await this.sevenShiftsApi.listTimePunches(
+            sevenShiftCompanyId,
+            {
+                locationId: sevenShiftLocationId,
+                userId: sevenShiftUserId,
+                start: new Date(startMs).toISOString(),
+                end: new Date(endMs).toISOString(),
+            }
+        )
+
+        const syncer = CalendarEventSyncerImpl.Syncer({
+            client: this.client,
+            eventTitle: 'Time Punch from SevenShifts',
+            eventTypeSlug: 'time-punch',
+            isBusy: true,
+            target: {
+                organizationId,
+                locationId,
+                personId,
+                calendarSlug: 'time-punches',
+            },
+        })
+
+        try {
+            await syncer.sync(
+                punches.map((tp) => ({
+                    id: tp.id,
+                    start: tp.clocked_in,
+                    end: tp.clocked_out,
+                }))
+            )
+        } catch (err) {
+            await this.client.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+                'seven-shifts.did-finish-sync::v2026_01_06',
+                {
+                    target: {
+                        organizationId,
+                    },
+                }
+            )
+
+            throw err
+        }
+    }
+
+    public static resetClass() {
+        this.Class = undefined
+    }
+}
+
+interface TimePunchSyncerOptions {
+    client: MercuryClient
+    sevenShiftsApi: SevenShiftsApi
+}
+
+export interface SyncTimePunchOptions {
+    from: {
+        sevenShiftCompanyId: number
+        sevenShiftLocationId: number
+        sevenShiftUserId: number
+    }
+    to: {
+        organizationId: string
+        locationId: string
+        personId: string
+    }
+}
+
+export interface TimePunchSyncer {
+    sync(options: SyncTimePunchOptions): Promise<void>
+}
diff --git a/src/syncing/UserSyncer.ts b/src/syncing/UserSyncer.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..07063f0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/syncing/UserSyncer.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,187 @@
+import { MercuryClient } from '@sprucelabs/mercury-client'
+import {
+    assertOptions,
+    formatPhoneNumber,
+    isValidNumber,
+} from '@sprucelabs/schema'
+import { Person } from '@sprucelabs/spruce-core-schemas'
+import { buildLog, Log } from '@sprucelabs/spruce-skill-utils'
+import { SevenShiftsApi, User } from './SevenShiftsApi'
+
+export default class UserSyncerImpl implements UserSyncer {
+    private sevenShiftsApi: SevenShiftsApi
+    private client: MercuryClient
+    public static Class: new (options: SyncerConstructorOptions) => UserSyncer
+    private log: Log = buildLog()
+
+    private constructor(options: SyncerConstructorOptions) {
+        const { client, sevenShiftsApi } = options
+        this.sevenShiftsApi = sevenShiftsApi
+        this.client = client
+    }
+
+    public static async Syncer(options: SyncerOptions) {
+        const { sevenShiftsApi, client } = assertOptions(options, [
+            'client',
+            'sevenShiftsApi',
+        ])
+
+        return new (this.Class ?? this)({ sevenShiftsApi, client })
+    }
+
+    public async syncUsers(options: SyncUsersOptions) {
+        const { from, to } = assertOptions(options, ['from', 'to'])
+        const { sevenShiftCompanyId, sevenShiftLocationId } = from
+        const { organizationId, locationId } = to
+
+        const results: UserSyncResult[] = []
+
+        const users = await this.sevenShiftsApi.listUsers(
+            sevenShiftCompanyId,
+            sevenShiftLocationId
+        )
+
+        const [{ roles }] = await this.client.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+            'list-roles::v2020_12_25',
+            {
+                target: {
+                    organizationId,
+                },
+                payload: {
+                    shouldIncludePrivateRoles: true,
+                },
+            }
+        )
+        const teammateId = roles.find((r) => r.base === 'teammate')!.id
+
+        for (let user of users) {
+            let personId: string
+
+            try {
+                const person = await this.upsertPerson(user)
+                personId = person.id
+            } catch (err) {
+                this.log.error(
+                    `Failed to upsert person for user ${user.id}: ${(err as Error).message}`
+                )
+                continue
+            }
+
+            await this.addRoleToPerson(
+                organizationId,
+                locationId,
+                personId,
+                teammateId
+            )
+            results.push({
+                from: {
+                    sevenShiftsUserId: user.id,
+                },
+                to: {
+                    personId,
+                },
+            })
+        }
+
+        return results
+    }
+
+    private async upsertPerson(user: User) {
+        let person: Person
+
+        try {
+            //TODO: Add this format in the get person event
+            const target = user.mobile_number
+                ? { phone: formatPhoneNumber(user.mobile_number) }
+                : {
+                      email: user.email,
+                  }
+
+            const [{ person: getPerson }] =
+                await this.client.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+                    'get-person::v2020_12_25',
+                    {
+                        target,
+                    }
+                )
+
+            person = getPerson
+        } catch {
+            const [{ person: createPerson }] =
+                await this.client.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+                    'create-person::v2020_12_25',
+                    {
+                        payload: {
+                            email: user.email,
+                            firstName: user.first_name,
+                            lastName: user.last_name,
+                            phone: isValidNumber(user.mobile_number as string)
+                                ? user.mobile_number
+                                : undefined,
+                        },
+                    }
+                )
+
+            person = createPerson
+        }
+        return person
+    }
+
+    private async addRoleToPerson(
+        organizationId: string,
+        locationId: string,
+        personId: string,
+        teammateId: string
+    ) {
+        try {
+            await this.client.emitAndFlattenResponses('add-role::v2020_12_25', {
+                target: {
+                    organizationId,
+                    locationId,
+                },
+                payload: {
+                    personId,
+                    roleId: teammateId,
+                },
+            })
+        } catch {}
+    }
+}
+
+export interface UserSyncer {
+    syncUsers(options: SyncUsersOptions): Promise<UserSyncResult[]>
+}
+
+interface SyncUsersFromOptions {
+    sevenShiftLocationId: number
+    sevenShiftCompanyId: number
+}
+
+interface SyncUsersToOptions {
+    organizationId: string
+    locationId: string
+}
+
+export interface SyncUsersOptions {
+    from?: SyncUsersFromOptions
+    to?: SyncUsersToOptions
+}
+
+interface SyncerOptions {
+    client: MercuryClient
+    sevenShiftsApi: SevenShiftsApi
+}
+
+export interface SyncerConstructorOptions {
+    sevenShiftsApi: SevenShiftsApi
+    client: MercuryClient
+}
+
+export interface UserSyncResult {
+    from: {
+        sevenShiftsUserId: number
+    }
+    to: {
+        personId: string
+    }
+}

+import { SkillEventContract } from '@sprucelabs/mercury-types'
+import {
+    SpruceEvent,
+    SpruceEventResponse,
+} from '@sprucelabs/spruce-event-utils'
+import { SpruceSchemas } from '#spruce/schemas/schemas.types'
+
+export default async (
+    event: SpruceEvent<SkillEventContract, EmitPayload>
+): SpruceEventResponse<ResponsePayload> => {
+    const { stores, target } = event
+    const { organizationId } = target
+    const syncStatuses = await stores.getStore('syncStatuses')
+    const count = await syncStatuses.count({
+        'target.organizationId': organizationId,
+        isSyncing: true,
+    })
+
+    return {
+        isSyncing: count > 0,
+    }
+}
+
+type EmitPayload =
+    SpruceSchemas.SevenShifts.v2026_01_06.CheckSyncStatusEmitTargetAndPayload
+
+type ResponsePayload =
+    SpruceSchemas.SevenShifts.v2026_01_06.CheckSyncStatusResponsePayload

+import { SkillEventContract } from '@sprucelabs/mercury-types'
+import {
+    SpruceEvent,
+    SpruceEventResponse,
+} from '@sprucelabs/spruce-event-utils'
+import { SpruceSchemas } from '#spruce/schemas/schemas.types'
+
+export default async (
+    event: SpruceEvent<SkillEventContract, EmitPayload>
+): SpruceEventResponse => {
+    const { stores, target } = event
+    const { organizationId } = target
+    const syncStatuses = await stores.getStore('syncStatuses')
+
+    await syncStatuses.upsertOne(
+        {
+            'target.organizationId': organizationId,
+        },
+        {
+            target: {
+                organizationId,
+            },
+            isSyncing: false,
+        }
+    )
+}
+
+type EmitPayload =
+    SpruceSchemas.SevenShifts.v2026_01_06.DidFinishSyncEmitTargetAndPayload

+import { SkillEventContract } from '@sprucelabs/mercury-types'
+import {
+    SpruceEvent,
+    SpruceEventResponse,
+} from '@sprucelabs/spruce-event-utils'
+import { SpruceSchemas } from '#spruce/schemas/schemas.types'
+
+export default async (
+    event: SpruceEvent<SkillEventContract, EmitPayload>
+): SpruceEventResponse<ResponsePayload> => {
+    const { target, syncOrchestrator } = event
+    const { organizationId } = target
+
+    await syncOrchestrator.sync(organizationId)
+
+    return {
+        wasSuccessful: true,
+    }
+}
+
+type EmitPayload =
+    SpruceSchemas.SevenShifts.v2026_01_06.SyncEmitTargetAndPayload
+
+type ResponsePayload = SpruceSchemas.SevenShifts.v2026_01_06.SyncResponsePayload

diff --git a/src/__tests__/behavioral/settings/SaveLocationSyncSettingsListener.test.ts b/src/__tests__/behavioral/settings/SaveLocationSyncSettingsListener.test.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..25db527
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/__tests__/behavioral/settings/SaveLocationSyncSettingsListener.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,142 @@
+import { fake, seed } from '@sprucelabs/spruce-test-fixtures'
+import { test, suite, assert, generateId } from '@sprucelabs/test-utils'
+import { SyncableLocation } from '../../../sevenShifts.types'
+import AbstractSevenShiftsTest from '../../support/AbstractSevenShiftsTest'
+
+@fake.login()
+@suite()
+export default class SaveLocationSyncSettingsListenerTest extends AbstractSevenShiftsTest {
+    private firstSyncableLocation!: SyncableLocation
+    @seed('organizations', 1)
+    @seed('syncableLocations', 1)
+    protected async beforeEach() {
+        await super.beforeEach()
+        await this.bootSkill()
+
+        this.firstSyncableLocation = await this.getFirstSyncableLocation()
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async skillIsListening() {
+        await this.emit()
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async canSaveSyncSettings() {
+        await this.emit()
+        const updated = await this.getFirstSyncableLocation()
+        assert.isEqual(
+            updated.shouldSync,
+            false,
+            'Should have updated sync setting.'
+        )
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async ifEmitWithShouldSyncTrueItUpdatesToTrue() {
+        await this.updateSyncableLocation({ shouldSync: false })
+        await this.emit({ shouldSync: true })
+        const updated = await this.getFirstSyncableLocation()
+        assert.isEqual(
+            updated.shouldSync,
+            true,
+            'Should have updated sync setting to true.'
+        )
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    @seed('syncableLocations', 1)
+    protected async honorsOrganizationId() {
+        const newOrg = generateId()
+        await this.updateSyncableLocation({ organizationId: newOrg })
+        await this.emit()
+        const updated = await this.syncableLocations.findOne({
+            'target.organizationId': newOrg,
+        })
+        assert.isEqual(
+            updated?.shouldSync,
+            true,
+            'Should have updated sync setting for correct organization.'
+        )
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async honorsSevenShiftLocationId() {
+        const newLocationId = this.generateRandomNumber()
+        await this.updateSyncableLocation({
+            sevenShiftsLocationId: newLocationId,
+        })
+        await this.emit()
+        const updated = await this.syncableLocations.findOne({
+            sevenShiftLocationId: newLocationId,
+        })
+        assert.isEqual(
+            updated?.shouldSync,
+            true,
+            'Should have updated sync setting for correct seven shifts location id.'
+        )
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async createsSyncableLocationRecordIfNoneExists() {
+        await this.syncableLocations.delete({})
+        await this.emit({ shouldSync: true })
+        const updated = await this.getFirstSyncableLocation()
+        assert.isEqual(
+            updated.sevenShiftLocationId,
+            this.firstSyncableLocation.sevenShiftLocationId,
+            'Did not create new syncable location record.'
+        )
+
+        assert.isEqual(
+            updated.shouldSync,
+            true,
+            'Did not set shouldSync on new record.'
+        )
+
+        assert.isEqual(
+            updated.target.organizationId,
+            this.fakedOrganizations[0].id,
+            'Did not set organizationId on new record.'
+        )
+    }
+
+    private async updateSyncableLocation(options?: {
+        organizationId?: string
+        sevenShiftsLocationId?: number
+        shouldSync?: boolean
+    }) {
+        const { organizationId, sevenShiftsLocationId } = options || {}
+        await this.syncableLocations.updateOne(
+            {},
+            {
+                'target.organizationId':
+                    organizationId ?? this.fakedOrganizations[0].id,
+                'target.sevenShiftCompanyId': this.generateRandomNumber(),
+                sevenShiftLocationId:
+                    sevenShiftsLocationId ??
+                    this.firstSyncableLocation.sevenShiftLocationId,
+                shouldSync: options?.shouldSync ?? true,
+            }
+        )
+    }
+
+    private async emit(options?: { shouldSync: boolean }) {
+        const { shouldSync } = options || {}
+        await this.fakedClient.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+            'seven-shifts.save-location-sync-settings::v2026_01_06',
+            {
+                target: {
+                    organizationId: this.fakedOrganizations[0].id,
+                    sevenShiftsLocationId:
+                        this.firstSyncableLocation.sevenShiftLocationId,
+                    sevenShiftscCompanyId:
+                        this.firstSyncableLocation.target.sevenShiftCompanyId,
+                },
+                payload: {
+                    shouldSync: shouldSync ?? false,
+                },
+            }
+        )
+    }
+}
diff --git a/src/__tests__/behavioral/settings/SetCompanyToSyncListener.test.ts b/src/__tests__/behavioral/settings/SetCompanyToSyncListener.test.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..87b8dc9
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/__tests__/behavioral/settings/SetCompanyToSyncListener.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,150 @@
+import { fake, seed } from '@sprucelabs/spruce-test-fixtures'
+import { test, suite, assert, generateId } from '@sprucelabs/test-utils'
+import SevenShiftsApiImpl from '../../../syncing/SevenShiftsApi'
+import AbstractSevenShiftsTest from '../../support/AbstractSevenShiftsTest'
+import MockSevenShiftApi from '../../support/MockSevenShiftApi'
+
+@fake.login()
+@suite()
+export default class SetCompanyToSyncListenerTest extends AbstractSevenShiftsTest {
+    @seed('organizations', 1)
+    protected async beforeEach() {
+        await super.beforeEach()
+        await this.bootSkill()
+
+        SevenShiftsApiImpl.Class = MockSevenShiftApi
+        MockSevenShiftApi.reset()
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async skillIsListening() {
+        await this.emit()
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async canCreateSyncableLocationsData() {
+        const location = this.generateSevenShiftLocationValues()
+        MockSevenShiftApi.listLocationsResponse = [location]
+        await this.emit()
+        const syncableLocation = await this.syncableLocations.findOne({})
+        assert.isEqualDeep(syncableLocation, {
+            id: syncableLocation!.id,
+            sevenShiftLocationId: location.id,
+            shouldSync: false,
+            target: {
+                organizationId: this.fakedOrganizations[0].id,
+                sevenShiftCompanyId: location.company_id,
+            },
+        })
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async shouldPassRightCompanyIdToListLocations() {
+        const companyId = this.generateRandomNumber()
+        await this.emit({ companyId })
+        MockSevenShiftApi.instance.assertListLocationsCalledWithRightCompanyId(
+            companyId
+        )
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async canCreateMultipleSyncableLocationsData() {
+        const locations = [
+            this.generateSevenShiftLocationValues(),
+            this.generateSevenShiftLocationValues(),
+            this.generateSevenShiftLocationValues(),
+        ]
+        MockSevenShiftApi.listLocationsResponse = locations
+        await this.emit()
+        const syncableLocations = await this.syncableLocations.find({})
+
+        locations.forEach((location, index) => {
+            assert.isEqualDeep(syncableLocations[index], {
+                id: syncableLocations[index].id,
+                sevenShiftLocationId: location.id,
+                shouldSync: false,
+                target: {
+                    organizationId: this.fakedOrganizations[0].id,
+                    sevenShiftCompanyId: location.company_id,
+                },
+            })
+        })
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async shouldNotCreateDuplicateSyncableLocations() {
+        const location = this.generateSevenShiftLocationValues()
+        MockSevenShiftApi.listLocationsResponse = [location]
+        await this.emit()
+        await this.emit()
+        const syncableLocations = await this.syncableLocations.find({})
+        assert.isEqual(syncableLocations.length, 1)
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async shouldCreateSelectedCompanyRecord() {
+        const companyId = this.generateRandomNumber()
+        await this.emit({ companyId })
+        const selectedCompanies = await this.selectedCompanies.find({})
+        assert.isEqualDeep(selectedCompanies[0], {
+            id: selectedCompanies[0].id,
+            target: {
+                organizationId: this.fakedOrganizations[0].id,
+                sevenShiftCompanyId: companyId,
+            },
+        })
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async shouldNotCreateSelectedCompanyForTheSameOrganizationId() {
+        const companyId = this.generateRandomNumber()
+        await this.emit({ companyId })
+        await this.emit({ companyId })
+        const selectedCompanies = await this.selectedCompanies.find({})
+        assert.isEqual(selectedCompanies.length, 1)
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async canCreateSelectedCompanyForDifferentOrganizationIds() {
+        const organizationId = generateId()
+        await this.emit()
+        await this.emit({ organizationId })
+        const selectedCompanies = await this.selectedCompanies.find({})
+        assert.isEqual(selectedCompanies.length, 2)
+    }
+
+    @test()
+    protected async emittingTwiceUpdatesRecord() {
+        const location = this.generateSevenShiftLocationValues()
+        const companyId = this.generateRandomNumber()
+        MockSevenShiftApi.listLocationsResponse = [location]
+        await this.emit()
+        await this.emit({ companyId })
+        const selectedCompany = await this.getFirstSelectedCompany()
+        assert.isEqualDeep(selectedCompany, {
+            id: selectedCompany!.id,
+            target: {
+                organizationId: this.fakedOrganizations[0].id,
+                sevenShiftCompanyId: companyId,
+            },
+        })
+    }
+
+    private async emit(options?: {
+        companyId?: number
+        organizationId?: string
+    }) {
+        const { companyId, organizationId } = options || {}
+        await this.fakedClient.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+            'seven-shifts.set-company-to-sync::v2026_01_06',
+            {
+                target: {
+                    organizationId:
+                        organizationId ?? this.fakedOrganizations[0].id,
+                    sevenShiftCompanyId:
+                        companyId ?? this.generateRandomNumber(),
+                },
+            }
+        )
+    }
+}

+import { SkillEventContract } from '@sprucelabs/mercury-types'

+
+export default async (
+    event: SpruceEvent<SkillEventContract, EmitPayload>
+): SpruceEventResponse<ResponsePayload> => {

+

+    }

+
+type ResponsePayload =
+    SpruceSchemas.SevenShifts.v2026_01_06.ListCompaniesResponsePayload

new file mode 100644

--- /dev/null

@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+import { SkillEventContract } from '@sprucelabs/mercury-types'
+import {
+    SpruceEvent,
+    SpruceEventResponse,
+} from '@sprucelabs/spruce-event-utils'
+import { SpruceSchemas } from '#spruce/schemas/schemas.types'
+
+export default async (
+    event: SpruceEvent<SkillEventContract, EmitPayload>
+): SpruceEventResponse<ResponsePayload> => {
+    const { target, stores, sevenShiftsApi } = event
+    const { sevenShiftCompanyId } = target
+
+    const locations = await sevenShiftsApi.listLocations(sevenShiftCompanyId)
+
+    console.log('Locations from SevenShifts API:', locations)
+
+    const syncableLocations = await stores.getStore('syncableLocations')
+
+    const records = await syncableLocations.find({})
+
+    const response = locations.map((location) => {
+        const record = records.find(
+            (r) => r.sevenShiftLocationId === location.id
+        )
+        return {
+            sevenShiftLocationId: location.id,
+            sevenShiftLocationName: location.name,
+            shouldSync: record?.shouldSync ?? false,
+        }
+    })
+
+    return {
+        locations: response ?? [],
+    }
+}
+
+type EmitPayload =
+    SpruceSchemas.SevenShifts.v2026_01_06.ListLocationsEmitTargetAndPayload
+
+type ResponsePayload =
+    SpruceSchemas.SevenShifts.v2026_01_06.ListLocationsResponsePayload

+import { SkillEventContract } from '@sprucelabs/mercury-types'
+import {
+    SpruceEvent,
+    SpruceEventResponse,
+} from '@sprucelabs/spruce-event-utils'
+import { SpruceSchemas } from '#spruce/schemas/schemas.types'
+
+export default async (
+    event: SpruceEvent<SkillEventContract, EmitPayload>
+): SpruceEventResponse<ResponsePayload> => {
+    const { stores, payload, target } = event
+    const { organizationId, sevenShiftsLocationId, sevenShiftscCompanyId } =
+        target
+    const { shouldSync } = payload
+
+    const syncableLocations = await stores.getStore('syncableLocations')
+
+    await syncableLocations.upsertOne(
+        {
+            'target.organizationId': organizationId,
+            sevenShiftLocationId: sevenShiftsLocationId,
+        },
+        {
+            target: {
+                organizationId,
+                sevenShiftCompanyId: sevenShiftscCompanyId,
+            },
+            sevenShiftLocationId: sevenShiftsLocationId,
+            shouldSync,
+        }
+    )
+
+    return {
+        wasSuccessful: true,
+    }
+}
+
+type EmitPayload =
+    SpruceSchemas.SevenShifts.v2026_01_06.SaveLocationSyncSettingsEmitTargetAndPayload
+
+type ResponsePayload =
+    SpruceSchemas.SevenShifts.v2026_01_06.SaveLocationSyncSettingsResponsePayload

+import { SkillEventContract } from '@sprucelabs/mercury-types'
+import {
+    SpruceEvent,
+    SpruceEventResponse,
+} from '@sprucelabs/spruce-event-utils'
+import { SpruceSchemas } from '#spruce/schemas/schemas.types'
+
+export default async (
+    event: SpruceEvent<SkillEventContract, EmitPayload>
+): SpruceEventResponse<ResponsePayload> => {
+    const { stores, target, sevenShiftsApi } = event
+    const { organizationId, sevenShiftCompanyId } = target
+
+    const syncableLocations = await stores.getStore('syncableLocations')
+    const selectedCompanies = await stores.getStore('selectedCompanies')
+
+    //this all needs to be removed
+    //REMOVE START
+    const locations = await sevenShiftsApi.listLocations(sevenShiftCompanyId)
+
+    for (const location of locations) {
+        const locationExists = await syncableLocations.findOne({
+            sevenShiftLocationId: location.id,
+        })
+
+        if (!locationExists) {
+            await syncableLocations.createOne({
+                sevenShiftLocationId: location.id,
+                shouldSync: false,
+                target: {
+                    organizationId,
+                    sevenShiftCompanyId: location.company_id,
+                },
+            })
+        }
+    }
+    //REMOVE END
+    //inside of save-location-to-sync listener you must upsert (create or update) the syncable location
+
+    await selectedCompanies.upsertOne(
+        {
+            'target.organizationId': organizationId,
+        },
+        {
+            target: {
+                organizationId,
+                sevenShiftCompanyId,
+            },
+        }
+    )
+
+    return {
+        wasSuccessful: true,
+    }
+}
+
+type EmitPayload =
+    SpruceSchemas.SevenShifts.v2026_01_06.SetCompanyToSyncEmitTargetAndPayload
+
+type ResponsePayload =
+    SpruceSchemas.SevenShifts.v2026_01_06.SetCompanyToSyncResponsePayload

diff --git a/src/sync/CalendarEventSyncer.ts b/src/sync/CalendarEventSyncer.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..ad84dcb
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/sync/CalendarEventSyncer.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,210 @@
+import { dateUtil } from '@sprucelabs/calendar-utils'
+import { MercuryClient } from '@sprucelabs/mercury-client'
+import { buildLog } from '@sprucelabs/spruce-skill-utils'
+
+export default class CalendarEventSyncerImpl implements CalendarEventSyncer {
+    public static Class?: new (
+        options: EventSyncerOptions
+    ) => CalendarEventSyncer
+
+    private client: MercuryClient
+    private organizationId: string
+    private locationId: string
+    private personId: string
+    private calendarSlug: string
+    private eventTitle: string
+    private eventTypeSlug: string
+    private isBusy: boolean
+    private log = buildLog('CalendarEventSyncer')
+
+    private constructor(options: EventSyncerOptions) {
+        const { client, target, eventTitle, eventTypeSlug, isBusy } = options
+        const { organizationId, locationId, personId, calendarSlug } = target
+
+        this.client = client
+        this.organizationId = organizationId
+        this.locationId = locationId
+        this.personId = personId
+        this.calendarSlug = calendarSlug
+        this.eventTitle = eventTitle
+        this.eventTypeSlug = eventTypeSlug
+        this.isBusy = isBusy
+    }
+
+    public static Syncer(options: EventSyncerOptions) {
+        return new (this.Class ?? this)(options)
+    }
+
+    public async sync(remote: EventSyncerRemoteObject[]) {
+        const startMs = dateUtil.addDays(dateUtil.getStartOfDay(Date.now()), -7)
+        const endMs = dateUtil.addDays(dateUtil.getEndOfDay(Date.now()), 7)
+
+        const calendar = await this.loadDestinationCalendar()
+        const events = await this.loadSchedule({
+            calendarId: calendar.id,
+            endMs,
+            startMs,
+        })
+
+        for (const event of events) {
+            const match = remote.find(
+                (m) => this.generateGroupId(m) === event.groupId
+            )
+
+            if (!match) {
+                try {
+                    await this.client.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+                        'calendar.cancel-calendar-event::v2021_05_19',
+                        {
+                            target: {
+                                calendarEventId: event.id,
+                                locationId: this.locationId,
+                            },
+                        }
+                    )
+                } catch (err: any) {
+                    this.log.error(
+                        `Failed to cancel calendar event`,
+                        err.stack ?? err.message
+                    )
+                }
+            } else {
+                remote.splice(remote.indexOf(match), 1)
+                const { start, minutes } = this.getRemoteTiming(match)
+                try {
+                    await this.client.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+                        'calendar.update-calendar-event::v2021_05_19',
+                        {
+                            target: {
+                                calendarEventId: event.id,
+                                calendarEventPersonId: this.personId,
+                                locationId: this.locationId,
+                            },
+                            payload: {
+                                startDateTimeMs: start,
+                                timeBlocks: [
+                                    {
+                                        durationMinutes: minutes,
+                                        isBusy: this.isBusy,
+                                        title: this.eventTitle,
+                                    },
+                                ],
+                            },
+                        }
+                    )
+                } catch (err: any) {
+                    this.log.error(
+                        `Failed to update calendar event`,
+                        err.stack ?? err.message
+                    )
+                }
+            }
+        }
+
+        for (const object of remote) {
+            const { start, minutes } = this.getRemoteTiming(object)
+
+            try {
+                await this.client.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+                    'calendar.create-calendar-event::v2021_05_19',
+                    {
+                        target: {
+                            calendarEventPersonId: this.personId,
+                            calendarId: calendar.id,
+                            locationId: this.locationId,
+                        },
+                        payload: {
+                            startDateTimeMs: start,
+                            groupId: this.generateGroupId(object),
+                            eventTypeSlug: this.eventTypeSlug,
+                            timeBlocks: [
+                                {
+                                    durationMinutes: minutes,
+                                    isBusy: this.isBusy,
+                                    title: this.eventTitle,
+                                },
+                            ],
+                        },
+                    }
+                )
+            } catch (err: any) {
+                this.log.error(
+                    `Failed to create calendar event`,
+                    err.stack ?? err.message
+                )
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    private generateGroupId(s: EventSyncerRemoteObject) {
+        return `seven-shifts-${this.eventTypeSlug}-${s.id}`
+    }
+
+    private async loadDestinationCalendar() {
+        const [{ calendar }] = await this.client.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+            'calendar.get-calendar::v2021_05_19',
+            {
+                target: {
+                    organizationId: this.organizationId,
+                    slug: this.calendarSlug,
+                },
+            }
+        )
+
+        return calendar
+    }
+
+    private async loadSchedule(options: {
+        calendarId: string
+        endMs: number
+        startMs: number
+    }) {
+        const { calendarId, endMs, startMs } = options
+        const [{ events }] = await this.client.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+            'calendar.get-schedules::v2021_05_19',
+            {
+                target: {
+                    calendarIds: [calendarId],
+                    locationId: this.locationId,
+                },
+                payload: {
+                    endDateTimeMs: endMs,
+                    startDateTimeMs: startMs,
+                    personIds: [this.personId],
+                },
+            }
+        )
+
+        return events
+    }
+
+    private getRemoteTiming(object: EventSyncerRemoteObject) {
+        const start = new Date(object.start).getTime()
+        const end = new Date(object.end).getTime()
+        const minutes = (end - start) / (1000 * 60)
+        return { start, minutes }
+    }
+}
+
+export interface EventSyncerRemoteObject {
+    id: number
+    start: string
+    end: string
+}
+
+export interface EventSyncerOptions {
+    client: MercuryClient
+    eventTypeSlug: 'shift' | 'time-punch'
+    eventTitle: 'Shift from SevenShifts' | 'Time Punch from SevenShifts'
+    isBusy: boolean
+    target: {
+        organizationId: string
+        locationId: string
+        personId: string
+        calendarSlug: string
+    }
+}
+
+export interface CalendarEventSyncer {
+    sync(remote: EventSyncerRemoteObject[]): Promise<void>
+}

new file mode 100644
index 0000000..88177aa
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/sync/LocationSyncer.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,155 @@
+import { SimpleStoreFactory } from '@sprucelabs/data-stores'
+import { MercuryClient } from '@sprucelabs/mercury-client'
+import { assertOptions } from '@sprucelabs/schema'
+import { SevenShiftsApi } from '../SevenShiftsApi'
+import SyncableLocationsStore from '../stores/SyncableLocations.store'
+
+export default class LocationSyncerImpl implements LocationSyncer {
+    public static Class?: new (
+        options: LocationSyncerConstructorOptions
+    ) => LocationSyncer
+    private sevenShiftsApi: SevenShiftsApi
+    private client: MercuryClient
+    private syncableLocations: SyncableLocationsStore
+
+    private constructor(options: LocationSyncerConstructorOptions) {
+        const { sevenShiftsApi: api, client, syncableLocations } = options
+        this.sevenShiftsApi = api!
+        this.client = client
+        this.syncableLocations = syncableLocations
+    }
+
+    public static async Syncer(options: {
+        sevenShiftsApi: SevenShiftsApi
+        client: MercuryClient
+        stores: SimpleStoreFactory
+    }) {
+        const { sevenShiftsApi, client, stores } = assertOptions(options, [
+            'sevenShiftsApi',
+            'client',
+            'stores',
+        ])
+
+        const syncableLocations = await stores.getStore('syncableLocations')
+        return new (this.Class ?? this)({
+            sevenShiftsApi,
+            client,
+            syncableLocations,
+        })
+    }
+
+    public async syncLocations(options: SyncLocationsOptions) {
+        const { from, to } = assertOptions(options, ['from', 'to'])
+        const { organizationId } = to
+        const { sevenShiftCompanyId } = from
+
+        const locations =
+            await this.sevenShiftsApi.listLocations(sevenShiftCompanyId)
+
+        let locationResults: LocationSyncResult[] = []
+
+        if (locations.length > 0) {
+            const [{ locations: existingLocations }] =
+                await this.client.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+                    'list-locations::v2020_12_25',
+                    {
+                        target: {
+                            organizationId,
+                        },
+                    }
+                )
+
+            for (let location of locations) {
+                const isSyncable = await this.syncableLocations.findOne({
+                    sevenShiftLocationId: location.id,
+                    'target.organizationId': organizationId,
+                    shouldSync: true,
+                })
+
+                const locationExists = existingLocations.find(
+                    (loc) => loc.num === location.id.toString()
+                )
+
+                let returningLocationId = locationExists?.id
+
+                if (isSyncable && !locationExists) {
+                    const [street, city, provinceAndZip, country] =
+                        location.formatted_address.split(', ') as (
+                            | string
+                            | undefined
+                        )[]
+
+                    const [province, zip] = provinceAndZip?.split(' ') || []
+
+                    const [{ location: createdLocation }] =
+                        await this.client.emitAndFlattenResponses(
+                            'create-location::v2020_12_25',
+                            {
+                                target: {
+                                    organizationId,
+                                },
+                                payload: {
+                                    name: location.name,
+                                    address: {
+                                        country:
+                                            country?.trim() ??
+                                            'Failed to parse',
+                                        city: city?.trim() ?? 'Failed to parse',
+                                        street1:
+                                            street?.trim() ?? 'Failed to parse',
+                                        province:
+                                            province?.trim() ??
+                                            'Failed to parse',
+                                        zip: zip?.trim() ?? 'Failed to parse',
+                                    },
+                                    num: location.id.toString(),
+                                },
+                            }
+                        )
+
+                    returningLocationId = createdLocation.id
+                }
+
+                if (returningLocationId) {
+                    locationResults.push({
+                        from: {
+                            sevenShiftsLocationId: location.id,
+                        },
+                        to: {
+                            locationId: returningLocationId,
+                        },
+                    })
+                }
+            }
+        }
+        return locationResults
+    }
+}
+
+export interface LocationSyncer {
+    syncLocations(options: SyncLocationsOptions): Promise<LocationSyncResult[]>
+}
+
+export interface LocationSyncResult {
+    from: {
+        sevenShiftsLocationId: number
+    }
+    to: {
+        locationId: string
+    }
+}
+
+export interface SyncLocationsOptions {
+    from?: {
+        sevenShiftCompanyId: number
+    }
+    to?: {
+        organizationId: string
+    }
+}
+
+export interface LocationSyncerConstructorOptions {
+    sevenShiftsApi?: SevenShiftsApi
+    client: MercuryClient
+    syncableLocations: SyncableLocationsStore
+}
